rulings.Case Title: GEORGE PATTERSON et al VS. ALTA BUILDING MATERIALS CO. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel The Further Deposition Of The Person Most Qualified And Custodian Of Records Of Defendant Kaiser Foundation Hospitals; Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Thursday, March 29, 2012 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 2. Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel further deposition of the person most knowledgeable and custodian of records of defendant Kaiser Foundation Hospitals and request for sanctions: hearing required. The hearing will be at 9:30am. Both sides must bring proposed orders to the hearing. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If a court reporter is needed, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN MCHUGH et al VS. THOMAS DEE ENGINEERING COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Plaintiffs¿ Motion To Compel Fdcc California, Inc. To Produce Custodian(S) Of Records And Person(S) Most Knowledgeable For Deposition And Responsive Documents
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Thursday, March 29, 2012 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel FDCC California, Inc. to produce custodian(s) of records and person(s) most knowledgeable for deposition and responsive documents is continued to May 30 per agreement of the parties. = (503/TLJ)
